content.text:
```mdl
@ Non‑Negotiable Confidentiality & Non‑Disclosure Agreement (Transportation Challenge 2017)
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_9_nda_7

open std.collections

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain entities
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Parties to the agreement
type Party = {
    name: string               # e.g. "Boston Public Schools", "Vendor"
}

@ The confidential data that is being exchanged
type ConfidentialInfo = {
    id: string,                # identifier for the data set
    shared_with: List<Party>,  # parties that have received the data
    is_shared_externally: bool # true if any party other than the intended recipient has it
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Concrete entities (stable, public model objects)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
entity bps: Party               # Boston Public Schools (receiving party)
entity vendor: Party             # Vendor (providing party)
entity confidential_info: ConfidentialInfo

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper functions
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Returns true if any party in the list is not BPS
func any_third_party_shared(info: ConfidentialInfo) -> bool:
    let rec check(lst: List<Party>) : bool =
        case lst:
            | Empty(_): false
            | Cons(p, rest):
                if p.name != bps.name then true else check(rest)
    check(info.shared_with)

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Obligations (deontic rules) – all requirements are expressed as LTLf “always”
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2 – Nondisclosure (VENDOR must not disclose Confidential Information)
rule F vendor_must_not_share_confidential:
    not any_third_party_shared(confidential_info) always

@ Clause 2 – Nondisclosure (BPS as not disclose Confidential Information to third parties)
rule F bps_must_not_share_confidential:
    not any_third_party_shared(confidential_info) always

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Optional: explicit statement that the “is_shared_externally” flag must reflect
# the actual sharing list (consistency check)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
rule O shared_flag_consistency:
    confidential_info.is_shared_externally = any_third_party_shared(confidential_info) always
```
